  "active_set": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Do you want the primary focus to be (A) technical review—logical consistency and claim–evidence alignment of the curvature/greedy guarantees and the reported results, or (B) language and clarity polish only? If neither, choose (C) citation accuracy/attribution check.",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Verify the internal logic linking the submodularity assumptions, the curvature-dependent guarantees, and the stated design principle to ensure the argument chain holds.",
    "R1.3": "Assess whether the reported curvature estimates and empirical optimality ratios appropriately support the narrative claims made about performance.",
    "RX.1": "Clearly flag any uncertainties or assumptions in the assessment, such as interpretive ambiguities around curvature estimation or guarantees.",
    "RX.2": "Avoid overstating what the cited theorems or the provided measurements establish about algorithmic performance.",
    "RX.3": "Keep the evaluation scoped to this paragraph’s arguments and claims rather than broader paper-wide restructuring or new analyses.",
    "RX.4": "Be cautious about endorsing methodological prescriptions that could mislead readers or practitioners if the underlying reasoning is shaky.",
    "RX.5": "Anchor each observation to specific sentences and citations in the paragraph to maintain traceability."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Do you want the primary focus to be (A) technical review—logical consistency and claim–evidence alignment of the curvature/greedy guarantees and the reported results, or (B) language and clarity polish only? If neither, choose (C) citation accuracy/attribution check.

rationale.R1.2: Verify the internal logic linking the submodularity assumptions, the curvature-dependent guarantees, and the stated design principle to ensure the argument chain holds.
rationale.R1.3: Assess whether the reported curvature estimates and empirical optimality ratios appropriately support the narrative claims made about performance.
rationale.RX.1: Clearly flag any uncertainties or assumptions in the assessment, such as interpretive ambiguities around curvature estimation or guarantees.
rationale.RX.2: Avoid overstating what the cited theorems or the provided measurements establish about algorithmic performance.
rationale.RX.3: Keep the evaluation scoped to this paragraph’s arguments and claims rather than broader paper-wide restructuring or new analyses.
rationale.RX.4: Be cautious about endorsing methodological prescriptions that could mislead readers or practitioners if the underlying reasoning is shaky.
rationale.RX.5: Anchor each observation to specific sentences and citations in the paragraph to maintain traceability.
